attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ST.HEADER_FLOW_ID, ST.HEADER_ID,
   ST.ORDER_NUMBER, ST.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,
   ST.ORG_ID, ST.CUST_PO_NUMBER,
   ST.ORDER_CATEGORY, ST.ORDER_TYPE_ID,
   ST.PRICE_LIST_ID, ST.PRICE_LIST_NAME,
   ST.PROGRAM_TYPE, ST.GOVERNMENT_ORDER_FLAG,
   ST.ORDER_SOURCE_ID, ST.ORDER_ORIGIN,
   ST.INTENDED_USE, ST.CURRENCY_CODE,
   ST.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, ST.CISCOAM_USER_ID,
   ST.ROUTE_TO_MARKET, ST.QUOTE_CREATION_DATE,
   ST.DEAL_ID, ST.ORDER_SUBMITTED_DATE,
   ST.ORDER_SUBMITTED_BY, ST.BOOKED_DATE,
   ST.FLOW_STATUS_CODE, ST.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID,
   ST.RESELLER_BID, ST.PAYMENT_METHOD,
   ST.TAXABILITY, ST.BILLTO_PGTMVBEGEOID,
   ST.BILLTO_PGTMVBEID, ST.BILLTO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
   ST.BILLTO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID, ST.BILLTO_CHANNELID,
   ST.HYBRID_ORDER_FLAG, ST.ERP_ORDER_NUMBER,
   ST.CREATION_DATE, ST.CREATED_BY,
   ST.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
   ST.IPADDRESS, ST.APPLICATION_NAME,
   ST.SERVICE_CONTEXT_TYPE, ST.SERVICE_CONTEXT_VERSION,
   ST.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE, ST.PROXY_USERNAME,
   ST.PROXY_USERID, ST.PROXY_USEREMAIL,
   ST.USEREMAIL, ST.CCP_HOLD_CAUSE,
   ST.CREDIT_ANALYST_EMAIL, ST.ECONOMIC_CUSTOMER_ID,
   ST.ECONOMIC_CUSTOMER_NAME, ST.HOLD_AMOUNT,
   ST.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEGEOID, ST.ADVANCE_DRAWDOWN,
   ST.TOTAL_ORDER_AMOUNT, ST.EXCEPTION_FLAG,
   ST.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEID, ST.EXCEPTION_MSG,
   ST.SOLDTO_CHANNELID, ST.SOLDTO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
   ST.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID, ST.OPEN_FLAG,
   ST.AUTO_RENEWAL_FLAG, ST.APPROVAL_CODE ,
 'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE,
 ST.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 ST.MIGRATION_TYPE, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY19 EA MIGRATION - SIGORANT*/
ST.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
ST.SK_ACQ_OPTY_ID,
ST.SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_ID,
/* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
ST.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
ST.DISTI_SO_NUMBER,
ST.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG,
ST.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
ST.CUSTOMER_PO_DATE,
ST.CANCELLED_FLAG,
ST.CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLAG,
ST.BILLING_DEPARTMENT,
ST.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID,
ST.SUB_AGENT_ID ,
ST.MASTER_AGENT_ID ,
ST.SUB_AGENT_NAME,
ST.TRANSACTION_FLOW,
ST.DEAL_TYPE /* Q1FY22 SEP ATHENA REL*/
 FROM 
  $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL ST
  LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUG 
   ON     ST.ORG_ID = EOUG.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
 LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_CHANNEL NSCT
    ON NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE=ST.BILLTO_CHANNELID
    AND TRIM(NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE)='ERP'
 LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST  NPL  
   ON NPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=ST.PRICE_LIST_ID
 LEFT JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY  NIC
    ON  NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE =ST.CURRENCY_CODE
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
  ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = ST.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID)
   LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
 ON NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT=NECALU_BILL.EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT
WHERE 
   (EOUG.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT IS NULL AND ST.ORG_ID IS NOT NULL)
OR (NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IS NULL AND ST.BILLTO_CHANNELID IS NOT NULL)
OR (NPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT IS NULL AND ST.PRICE_LIST_ID IS NOT NULL)
OR (NIC. BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE IS NULL AND ST.CURRENCY_CODE IS NOT NULL)
OR (NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY IS NULL AND ST.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID IS NOT NULL)
OR (NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY IS NULL)       
OR 
(
ST.ERP_ORDER_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
WHERE NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT =ST.ERP_ORDER_NUMBER
)
)

SELECT EX.HEADER_FLOW_ID, EX.HEADER_ID,
   EX.ORDER_NUMBER, EX.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,
   EX.ORG_ID, EX.CUST_PO_NUMBER,
   EX.ORDER_CATEGORY, EX.ORDER_TYPE_ID,
   EX.PRICE_LIST_ID, EX.PRICE_LIST_NAME,
   EX.PROGRAM_TYPE, EX.GOVERNMENT_ORDER_FLAG,
   EX.ORDER_SOURCE_ID, EX.ORDER_ORIGIN,
   EX.INTENDED_USE, EX.CURRENCY_CODE,
   EX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, EX.CISCOAM_USER_ID,
   EX.ROUTE_TO_MARKET, EX.QUOTE_CREATION_DATE,
   EX.DEAL_ID, EX.ORDER_SUBMITTED_DATE,
   EX.ORDER_SUBMITTED_BY, EX.BOOKED_DATE,
   EX.FLOW_STATUS_CODE, EX.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID,
   EX.RESELLER_BID, EX.PAYMENT_METHOD,
   EX.TAXABILITY, EX.BILLTO_PGTMVBEGEOID,
   EX.BILLTO_PGTMVBEID, EX.BILLTO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
   EX.BILLTO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID, EX.BILLTO_CHANNELID,
   EX.HYBRID_ORDER_FLAG, EX.ERP_ORDER_NUMBER,
   EX.CREATION_DATE, EX.CREATED_BY,
   EX.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, EX.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
   EX.IPADDRESS, EX.APPLICATION_NAME,
   EX.SERVICE_CONTEXT_TYPE, EX.SERVICE_CONTEXT_VERSION,
   EX.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE, EX.PROXY_USERNAME,
   EX.PROXY_USERID, EX.PROXY_USEREMAIL,
   EX.USEREMAIL, EX.CCP_HOLD_CAUSE,
   EX.CREDIT_ANALYST_EMAIL, EX.ECONOMIC_CUSTOMER_ID,
   EX.ECONOMIC_CUSTOMER_NAME, EX.HOLD_AMOUNT,
   EX.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEGEOID, EX.ADVANCE_DRAWDOWN,
   EX.TOTAL_ORDER_AMOUNT, EX.EXCEPTION_FLAG,
   EX.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEID, EX.EXCEPTION_MSG,
   EX.SOLDTO_CHANNELID, EX.SOLDTO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
   EX.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID, EX.OPEN_FLAG,
   EX.AUTO_RENEWAL_FLAG, EX.APPROVAL_CODE ,
   EX.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
   EX.MIGRATION_TYPE ,/*ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY19 EA MIGRATION - SIGORANT*/
   EX.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
   EX.SK_ACQ_OPTY_ID,
   EX.SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_ID,
   /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
   EX.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
   EX.DISTI_SO_NUMBER,
   EX.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG,
   EX.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
   EX.CUSTOMER_PO_DATE,
   EX.CANCELLED_FLAG,
   EX.CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLAG,
   EX.BILLING_DEPARTMENT,
   EX.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID,
   EX.SUB_AGENT_ID ,
EX.MASTER_AGENT_ID ,
EX.SUB_AGENT_NAME,
EX.TRANSACTION_FLOW,
EX.DEAL_TYPE /* Q1FY22 SEP ATHENA REL*/ 
 FROM 
  $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL EX
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL ST
 WHERE ST.HEADER_ID=EX.HEADER_ID )

SELECT 
 RANK() OVER 
    (ORDER BY SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT)  +  SMHDR_MAX.MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
 STHDR_BK.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
 STHDR_BK.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
 USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 'Y' DV_NRT_BATCH_FLAG,
 STHDR_BK.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,
 STHDR_BK.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,
 STHDR_BK.MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT DISTINCT
   EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE      BK_COMPANY_CODE,
   EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY     BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  -6666  ORDER_NUMBER,
  -6666  SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
  HEADER_ID SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,
  HEADER_ID SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,
  'OPL' SS_CODE ,
  'OPL' AS MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
 FROM
  (SELECT * FROM 
   $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL 
   WHERE ERP_ORDER_NUMBER IS NULL)SCOOHA   
   INNER JOIN    $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
    ON( SCOOHA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)   )  STHDR_BK,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_KEY),0) MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_NRT WHERE SS_CODE='OPL') SMHDR_MAX
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM 
 (SELECT COALESCE(SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,SSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW
 FROM 
 $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_NRT SSO 
 GROUP BY 1
 )SSO
  WHERE  
	--SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE =STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AND
    --SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND
    --SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER AND 
	SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW=STHDR_BK.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT 
	--AND SSO.MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD=STHDR_BK.MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
	)
	/*
 AND  NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM  
  (SELECT 
   EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE      BK_COMPANY_CODE,
   EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
   ECOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER      ORDER_NUMBER,
   ECOOHA.HEADER_ID         
   ECOOHA.HEADER_ID 
  FROM  
   $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL ECOOHA  
    INNER JOIN    $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
     ON( ECOOHA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  
  )EXCEP_BK
  WHERE  EXCEP_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE =STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AND
    EXCEP_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND
    EXCEP_BK.ORDER_NUMBER=STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER AND 
	COALESCE(SSON.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,SSON.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT)=STHDR_BK.HEADER_ID AND
    SSON.MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD=STHDR_BK.MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD))      */
